WARP and CTRP spz dataset plots and analysis 12 Nov 2025

library(lme4)
library(MASS)
library(ggplot2)
library(emmeans)
library(tidyverse)
library(glmmTMB)
library(car)
library(devtools)
library(cowplot)
library(broom.mixed)
CTRP <- read.csv("/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/Sporozoite_all_genes/CTRP_table_sporozoite_normalised_27Mar25.csv")
WARP <- read.csv("/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/Sporozoite_all_genes/WARP_table_sporozoite_normalised_25Aug25.csv")


WARP <- WARP[ , 1:9]
CTRP <- CTRP[ , 1:9]

WARP$gene <- rep("WARP", length(WARP$name))
CTRP$gene <- rep("CTRP", length(CTRP$name))

#CTRP <- subset(CTRP, background!="HB3")
#CTRP <- subset(CTRP, clone!="bulk")

CTRP$RefAlt <- ifelse(CTRP$allele == "D", "Ref", "Alt")
WARP$RefAlt <- ifelse(WARP$allele == "F", "Ref", "Alt")

alldata <- rbind(CTRP, WARP)

write.csv(alldata, file="/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/analysis/spz_warpctrp_20260416.csv")

Subset data and set as factors

alldata <- subset(alldata, clone!="3D7")

alldata$clone<-as.factor(alldata$clone)
alldata$allele<-as.factor(alldata$allele)
alldata$rep<-as.factor(alldata$rep)
alldata$mosquito<-as.factor(alldata$mosquito)
alldata$RefAlt <- factor(alldata$RefAlt, levels = c("Ref","Alt"), ordered = TRUE)

summary(alldata$sporozoites)
##     Min.  1st Qu.   Median     Mean  3rd Qu.     Max. 
##     0.00     0.00     0.00   392.49    46.94 19447.99
var(alldata$sporozoites)
## [1] 2505208
#alldata <- subset(alldata, mosquito!="An_alb")

alldata$spz_prev <- rep(0, length(alldata$name))
alldata[which(alldata$sporozoites > 0), ]$spz_prev <- 1

alldata$mosq_allele <- interaction(alldata$mosquito,
                                           alldata$allele,
                                           sep = "_")

Plot graph from raw data

# The genes you want to loop over
genes_to_plot <- c("CTRP", "WARP")

# Make plots for each gene
plots <- lapply(genes_to_plot, function(g) {
  ggplot(data = subset(alldata, gene == g), aes(x = RefAlt, y = log(sporozoites + 1))) +
  geom_violin(size = 0.4) +
  geom_jitter(
    width  = 0.2,
    height = 0.2,
    aes(color = RefAlt),
    size   = 0.7,
    alpha  = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, NA),
    oob    = scales::oob_squish_any,  # squish negatives to 0
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .05))
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c("Ref" = "Ref", "Alt" = "Alt")
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("#E31A1C", "#6A3D9A")
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    . ~ mosquito,
    labeller = labeller(
      mosquito = c(
        "An_gam"   = "gambiae",
        "An_steph" = "stephensi",
        "An_mini"  = "minimus",
        "An_alb"   = "albimanus"
      )
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.line        = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.3, linetype = "solid"), 
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"), 
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "italic", size = 5),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.title.x     = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y     = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "none",
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm")
  )
})
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
## Warning: The `size` argument of `element_line()` is deprecated as of ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use the `linewidth` argument instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
# Access a specific plot
plots[[1]]

plots[[2]]

for (i in seq_along(plots)) {
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path("/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/plots/", paste0("violin_spz", genes_to_plot[i], ".pdf")),
    plot = plots[[i]],
    width = 2.25,
    height = 1.75,
    units = "in"
  )
}

Calculate N and prop infected to place below raw data plots

prop_infected <- alldata %>%
  group_by(mosquito, gene, RefAlt) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total      = n(),
    n_infected   = sum(spz_prev, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_infected = mean(spz_prev, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pct_infected = round(prop_infected * 100, 1)  # one decimal place
  )

prop_infected
#write.csv(prop_infected, file="/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/analysis/spz_prevs_warpctrp_20251112.csv")

Run spz prev model and calculate emmeans

# List of genes to loop over
genes <- c("CTRP",  "WARP")

results <- lapply(genes, function(g) {
  
  df <- subset(alldata, gene == g)   # adjust if data frame has a different name
  
  form <- spz_prev ~ RefAlt * mosquito + (1 | rep) + (1 | clone)

  mod <- glmmTMB(
    form,
    family = binomial(link = "logit"),
    data = df
  )
  
  # Tidy summary (fixed effects only)
  sum_df <- broom.mixed::tidy(mod, effects = "fixed") %>%
    mutate(gene = g)
  
  # ANOVA table
  anova_tab <- Anova(mod, type = "III")
  anova_df <- as.data.frame(anova_tab) %>%
    rownames_to_column("term") %>%
    mutate(gene = g)
  
 # EMMeans + contrasts
  emm_tab <- emmeans(mod, specs = pairwise ~ RefAlt | mosquito, type = "response")
  
  emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm_tab$emmeans) %>%
    mutate(gene = g)
  
  contrast_df <- as.data.frame(emm_tab$contrasts) %>%
    mutate(gene = g)
  
  list(summary = sum_df, anova = anova_df, emm = emm_df, contrasts = contrast_df)
})

# Combine across genes
summary_all   <- bind_rows(lapply(results, `[[`, "summary"))
anova_all     <- bind_rows(lapply(results, `[[`, "anova"))
emm_all       <- bind_rows(lapply(results, `[[`, "emm"))
contrasts_all <- bind_rows(lapply(results, `[[`, "contrasts"))

# Export to CSV
#write.csv(summary_all,   "spz_prev_summary_all.csv",   row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(anova_all,     "spz_prev_anova_all.csv",     row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(emm_all,       "spz_prev_emm_all.csv",       row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(contrasts_all, "spz_prev_contrasts_all.csv", row.names = FALSE)

summary_all
anova_all
emm_all
contrasts_all

Now make the EMM prev plots for spz

emm_all$symp <- rep("symp", length(emm_all$mosquito))
#emm_all[which(emm_all$mosquito == "An_gam" | "An_alb"), ]$symp <- "allo"
emm_all[emm_all$mosquito %in% c("An_gam", "An_alb"), ]$symp <- "allo"
#emm_all[which(emm_all$gene == "Pfs47"), ]$symp <- "allo"
#emm_all[emm_all$gene == "Pfs47" & emm_all$mosquito == "An_alb", ]$symp <- "symp"
emm_all[emm_all$gene == "CTRP" & emm_all$mosquito == "An_alb", ]$symp <- "symp"


emm_plots <- emm_all %>%
  group_split(gene) %>%
  setNames(unique(emm_all$gene)) %>%
  lapply(function(df) {
    ggplot(df, aes(x = RefAlt, y = prob, group = mosquito, color = mosquito, shape=symp)) + 
      geom_point(size = 0.5) + 
      geom_line(size = 0.25) +
      geom_ribbon(
        aes(ymin = prob - SE, ymax = prob + SE, fill = mosquito),
        alpha = 0.3, size= 0.15
      ) +
      theme_classic(base_size = 4) + 
      scale_fill_manual(values = c(
        "An_gam"   = "#ECC671",
        "An_mini"  = "#7CB599",
        "An_steph" = "#D5ABC6",
        "An_alb"   = "#1F78B4"
      )) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = c(
        "An_gam"   = "#ECC671",
        "An_mini"  = "#7CB599",
        "An_steph" = "#D5ABC6",
        "An_alb"   = "#1F78B4"
      )) +
      scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.2, 0.2))) +
      theme(
  axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size = 3),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 3),
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.title.y = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),
  axis.ticks.length = unit(0.05, "cm"),
  legend.position = "none"
)
      #ggtitle(unique(df$gene))   # Add gene title
  })

emm_plots[["CTRP"]]

emm_plots[["WARP"]]

for (i in seq_along(plots)) {
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path("/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/plots/", paste0("spz_prev_", genes_to_plot[i], ".pdf")),
    plot = emm_plots[[i]],
    width = 0.75,
    height = 1,
    units = "in"
  )
}

Now do stats and plots for spz Intensity

spz_nozeros <- subset(alldata, alldata$sporozoites > 0)


genes <- c("CTRP",  "WARP")

results <- lapply(genes, function(g) {
  
  df <- subset(spz_nozeros, gene == g)   # subset by gene
  
  # Drop An_alb for WARP only
  if (g == "WARP") {
    df <- subset(df, mosquito != "An_alb")
    df <- droplevels(df)
  }
  
  form <- log(sporozoites + 1) ~ RefAlt * mosquito + (1 | rep) + (1 | clone)
  # Fit model
  mod <- glmmTMB(
    form,
    family = gaussian(),
    data = df
  )
  

  # Tidy summary (fixed effects only)
  sum_df <- broom.mixed::tidy(mod, effects = "fixed") %>%
    mutate(gene = g)
  
  # ANOVA table
  anova_tab <- Anova(mod, type = "III")
  anova_df <- as.data.frame(anova_tab) %>%
    rownames_to_column("term") %>%
    mutate(gene = g)
  
 # EMMeans + contrasts
  emm_tab <- emmeans(mod, specs = pairwise ~ RefAlt | mosquito)
  
  emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm_tab$emmeans) %>%
    mutate(gene = g)
  
  contrast_df <- as.data.frame(emm_tab$contrasts) %>%
    mutate(gene = g)
  
  list(summary = sum_df, anova = anova_df, emm = emm_df, contrasts = contrast_df)
})

# Combine across genes
summary_all   <- bind_rows(lapply(results, `[[`, "summary"))
anova_all     <- bind_rows(lapply(results, `[[`, "anova"))
emm_all       <- bind_rows(lapply(results, `[[`, "emm"))
contrasts_all <- bind_rows(lapply(results, `[[`, "contrasts"))

# Export to CSV
write.csv(summary_all,   "spz_int_summary_ctrpwarp.csv",   row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(anova_all,     "spz_int_anova_ctrpwarp.csv",     row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(emm_all,       "spz_int_emm_ctrpwarp.csv",       row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(contrasts_all, "spz_int_contrasts_ctrpwarp.csv", row.names = FALSE)

summary_all
anova_all
emm_all
contrasts_all

Now make the EMM Intensity plots

emm_all$symp <- rep("symp", length(emm_all$mosquito))
emm_all[emm_all$mosquito %in% c("An_gam", "An_alb"), ]$symp <- "allo"
#emm_all[which(emm_all$gene == "Pfs47"), ]$symp <- "allo"
#emm_all[emm_all$gene == "Pfs47" & emm_all$mosquito == "An_alb", ]$symp <- "symp"
emm_all[emm_all$gene == "CTRP" & emm_all$mosquito == "An_alb", ]$symp <- "symp"


emm_plots <- emm_all %>%
  group_split(gene) %>%
  setNames(unique(emm_all$gene)) %>%
  lapply(function(df) {
    ggplot(df, aes(x = RefAlt, y = emmean, group = mosquito, color = mosquito, shape=symp)) + 
      geom_point(size = 1.3) + 
      geom_line(size = 0.55) +
      geom_ribbon(
        aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE, fill = mosquito),
        alpha = 0.3
      ) +
      theme_classic(base_size = 6) + 
      scale_fill_manual(values = c(
        "An_gam"   = "#ECC671",
        "An_mini"  = "#7CB599",
        "An_steph" = "#D5ABC6",
        "An_alb"   = "#1F78B4"
      )) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = c(
        "An_gam"   = "#ECC671",
        "An_mini"  = "#7CB599",
        "An_steph" = "#D5ABC6",
        "An_alb"   = "#1F78B4"
      )) +
      scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.2, 0.2))) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.x    = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y    = element_blank(),
        axis.text       = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm")
      ) 
      #ggtitle(unique(df$gene))   # Add gene title
  })

emm_plots[["CTRP"]]

emm_plots[["WARP"]]

pdf("/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/plots/intensity_spz_log_20251112.pdf", width = 8, height = 1.6)
plot_grid(plotlist = emm_plots, ncol = 5)
dev.off()
